description: Style Note Let only transform your everyday attire to fun, colourful and stylish! We're super excited in the myntra office to be selling these flattering tops and dresses from the quirky, flirty, denim brand ONLY. It's easy to look both cute and trendy when you're wearing anything from this summery collection. Product Details Peach printed top, has a round neckline, blue panel around the neckline and arm holes, gathers around the neckline, an elasticated band at the hip with loops for a sash, a blue fabric sash and two insert pockets on the sides in front below the elasticated band Material and Care 100% cotton Machine wash warm with like colours Do not bleach or tumble dry Use cold iron Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
